query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Multiple streaks of colored light arc across a completely black background. The visible light trails include white, pink, purple, red, orange, green, and yellow, varying in thickness and brightness. Some streaks cross each other while others run parallel, creating intersecting curves and lines of different lengths and curvatures against the void of darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Multiple streaks of colored light arc across a completely black background in an abstract composition lacking recognizable subjects or fine detail. The visible light trails include white, pink, purple, red, orange, green, and yellow, varying in thickness and brightness, with some streaks crossing each other while others run parallel. The image contains no resolvable textures, surfaces, or distinct forms, existing purely as intersecting curves of color and gesture without representational clarity.
